hooks.command: input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -q '"file_path":"[^"]*design-tokens[^"]*tokens\.json'; then cd design-tokens && npm run build && cp dist/DesignTokens.swift ../ios/NewsletterPodApp/DesignTokens.swift; fi

input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -qE '\.dart"'; then out=$(cd flutter && flutter analyze --no-pub 2>&1 | grep -E '•' | head -25); if [ -n "$out" ]; then echo "⚠ flutter analyze found issues (fix before commit):"; echo "$out"; fi; fi
